title.zh: Python 基础：本月学习总结
title.en: Python Basics: What I Learned This Month

desc.zh: 列表、字典、循环、函数——基础构建块。每天写小代码培养手感。
desc.en: Lists, dictionaries, loops, functions — the building blocks. Writing small programs every day to build muscle memory.

concepts.zh: 列表推导式比循环更简洁高效
concepts.en: List comprehensions are more concise than loops

concepts.zh: 字典用于键值映射，查询速度快
concepts.en: Dictionaries are fast for key-value lookups

concepts.zh: 函数是代码复用的基本单元
concepts.en: Functions are the basic unit of code reuse

content.zh: 这个月我系统地学习了 Python 的基础知识。以下是主要学习内容和心得。
content.en: This month I systematically studied Python basics. Here are the main topics and takeaways.

content.zh: 列表是 Python 中最常用的数据结构之一。列表推导式 [expr for item in iterable] 让代码更简洁高效。
content.en: Lists are one of the most commonly used data structures in Python. List comprehensions [expr for item in iterable] make code more concise.

content.zh:
# 传统方式
squares = []
for i in range(10):
    squares.append(i ** 2)

# 列表推导式（更简洁）
squares = [i ** 2 for i in range(10)]
content.en:
# Traditional way
squares = []
for i in range(10):
    squares.append(i ** 2)

# List comprehension (more concise)
squares = [i ** 2 for i in range(10)]

content.zh: 字典提供 O(1) 的查找速度，适合存储键值映射关系。
content.en: Dictionaries provide O(1) lookup speed, great for key-value mappings.

content.zh: 函数是代码复用的基本单元。Python 支持默认参数、关键字参数和可变参数。
content.en: Functions are the basic unit of code reuse. Python supports default args, keyword args, and variable-length args.

content.zh:
def greet(name, greeting="你好"):
    return f"{greeting}，{name}！"

print(greet("世界"))  # 你好，世界！
print(greet("World", "Hello"))  # Hello, World!
content.en:
def greet(name, greeting="Hello"):
    return f"{greeting}, {name}!"

print(greet("World"))  # Hello, World!
print(greet("世界", "你好"))  # 你好，世界！

items.zh: 列表推导式比 for 循环更简洁，可读性更好
items.en: List comprehensions are more readable than for loops

items.zh: 字典的 keys() / values() / items() 方法很实用
items.en: Dictionary keys() / values() / items() methods are very useful

items.zh: 函数参数灵活性：默认参数、*args、**kwargs

content.zh: 下个月计划学习面向对象编程和文件操作。
content.en: Next month: Object-oriented programming and file I/O.

title.zh: 我对大语言模型的理解

desc.zh: Transformer 工作原理（通俗版）、训练数据的作用、以及为什么 DeepSeek 的 MoE 架构很重要。
desc.en: How transformers work (in simple terms), what training data does, and why DeepSeek's MoE architecture is a big deal.

desc.zh: 人工智能专业课程的学习笔记和自我学习记录。本学期会持续更新。
desc.en: Notes from my AI courses and self-study sessions. Will be updated regularly throughout the semester.

desc.zh: 课余在 B 站学习政经哲史课程的笔记整理。
desc.en: Notes from politics, economics, philosophy, and history courses I watch on Bilibili in my free time.

title.zh: C++ 复习工作流：我是怎么搭建的

desc.zh: 结合 AI 工具搭建自动化复习流程——生成题目、检查答案、记录错题。不是学 C++ 最快的方法，但是最适合我的方法。
desc.en: Built an automated review workflow with AI tools — generates questions, checks answers, tracks mistakes. Not the fastest way to learn C++, but the way that works best for me.

concepts.zh: AI 辅助学习不等于偷懒，是提高效率
concepts.en: AI-assisted learning isn't laziness, it's efficiency

concepts.zh: 错题记录比刷题更重要
concepts.en: Error tracking matters more than volume

concepts.zh: 工具要服务方法，方法要服务目标
concepts.en: Tools serve methods, methods serve goals
